properties.name: Status
properties.description: Current progress state of the task.

properties.name: Priority
properties.description: Relative importance or urgency of the task.

properties.name: Due Date
properties.description: Date by which the task should be completed.

properties.name: Completed
properties.description: Whether the task has been fully completed.

properties.name: tags
properties.description: Short topical labels that group this task with related notes.

properties.name: Source
properties.description: Title, URL, book, paper, or other source being read.

properties.name: Author
properties.description: Person or organization that created the source.

properties.name: Status
properties.description: Current reading progress for the source.

properties.name: Rating
properties.description: Numeric personal rating for the source.

properties.name: tags
properties.description: Short topical labels that describe the source or reading theme.

properties.name: Status
properties.description: Current lifecycle state of the project.

properties.name: Owner
properties.description: Person responsible for driving or tracking the project.

properties.name: Start Date
properties.description: Date when the project begins or began.

properties.name: Target Date
properties.description: Intended completion or milestone date for the project.

properties.name: tags
properties.description: Short topical labels that group this project with related notes.
